title: Soul Stuff
description: Adds a bunch of useful soul-related building blocks.
body:
# Soul Stuff
Got the need for speed?
## A Spooky Collection of Soul Sand Derivatives

![separator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/43126f1132ede9757db540ebdac4738b0e13d3d3.png)

Q: _"Why this mod?"_  
A: _"I am a big Soul Speed user. I use Soul Soil as the floor in my builds to increase my efficiency.
I felt the need to have more Soul Speed blocks with functionalities other than just plain ol' dirt and sand."_
<details>
<summary>Features</summary>
All recipes are unlockable through obtaining their respective ingredients, just like vanilla stuff.  

See [Gallery](https://modrinth.com/project/soul-stuff/gallery)
<details>
<summary>Stone</summary>
2 new stone types:  

  -[Soul Stone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/tLwc35Mc/images/5cbf4497cadb48cf39d1226d13665679c0613e55.png)  
  -[Dark Soul Stone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/tLwc35Mc/images/184a77f7d0a3c913fb77a019d35c61ba6f654cf9.png)  

Complete with Bricks, Polished, Chiseled, Slabs, Stairs, Walls, Buttons and Pressure Plates.  
Both Soul Stone and Dark Soul Stone can be used as substitutes for Cobblestone in most recipes.
</details>

<details>
<summary>Glass</summary>

-[Soul Glass](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/tLwc35Mc/images/fc9f3538456168534d67481d3dab5c4b7360822c.png) along with it's tinted variant  
-Soul Glass Pane

Soul Glass can be used as a substitute for regular Glass in recipes.
</details>

<details>
<summary>Light</summary>
2 new light blocks:  

-[Soullight](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/tLwc35Mc/images/dd9f6128bce2ed96275c6bd1f64eaef5f07c7727.png)  
-[Nick o'Lantern](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/tLwc35Mc/images/d8d17720be7ca22d5ff24f3785d759175e71e5dc.png)  

Both Repels Piglins just like Soul Torches.
</details>

</details>

I HIGHLY recommend you using [This Resource Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/silent-soul-speed) if you are planning on using this mod.

![separator](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/43126f1132ede9757db540ebdac4738b0e13d3d3.png)

Let me know in the issues tab of the [Github Repository](https://github.com/Wondiws98/soul-stuff/issues) if you have problems, concerns or requests regarding this mod.
